review_title: For Ranking in Top search engine, Must needed tools for Content Optimization
description: I was waiting for some good deal for MaketMuse, after some time I got it from Appsumo, Firstly I was a little bit lost, but Customer support provides good resource, in some time I can easily get benefit from this application. I easily improve my content by analyzing ranked articles for specific keywords, identifying weak points of my article, and work on that area is the most important feature for me. MarketMuse helps me to save a large time of research time for specific keywords.
author: Khan Md Mohaiuminul Islam S.
pros: Good customer support, After purchasing I need to take some training to understand the basic work procedures, they technically help me. Content optimization in MarketMuse is top-notch, I can identify easily strengths points and weak points of ranked articles, by based on that I can optimize my content, In the long run, it helps to rank. As a result my content become more user frendly and audience loved it.
cons: I was wondering they should include the google docs plugin, it definitely increases our productivity. For large organizations MarketMuse is perfect, for small entrepreneurs like us it's very difficult for us o purchase in this price range, they would think about it also.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent for opimizing blog content
description: Despite MarketMuse not being the most user-friendly, it simply gets results. I use it because it helps me to get my content to rank higher, and that's the most important thing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that MarketMuse is effective. I use it on a regular basis to optimize blog content, both new posts and updating older posts. It's been very effective at helping me to achieve higher rankings, especially when updating existing content. It does take a little bit of extra time, but it's worth the effort.
cons: I find the usability to be very bad. I've been using MarketMuse for over a year and I still don't really understand how some things are supposed to work. I also use Frase and Frase is far more user-friendly.

review_title: An tool to organize the Content Writing
description: On overall, an Individual has to take an decision based on the risk Involved. I won't recommend it to others.
author: Ashok A.
pros: MarketMuse is good to organize the content writing. The tool has different options to analyze, research and organize the content.
cons: From the Point of Trust Worthiness, It is absolute zero stars. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT] does stand by his words. He often changes the pricing plan, sudden increase in cost adding limitation to what wee paid for and more.

review_title: Not for Me
description: Very frustrating! All the 3 trial periods were as bad as the other.
author: Zahra H.
pros: I was hoping to become best friends with MarketMuse, but the free trial was a complete waste. The UX and UI is very odd, well, not for an average laptop size anyway. The brand colours are very nice. Beyond this I couldn't see past the problems!
cons: Hmm lets see, I wasted 3 trials, so its the left panel which has an ad that won't go away! If it were to ever go away, I'd be able to get started on optimising the content. I wasted 7+ days just trying to figure out how to copy/paste from word to the area which hardly ever opened. There were few more annoying problems which they said are not there in paid version, but why would i spend money on a software which has a glitchy trial !
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The Best Content Optimization Tool
description: As I am not using credits for AI outline builder, I find MarketMuse insufficient for research and outline builder and I am using other tools for that. But, MarketMuse is the best content optimisation tool available. Hands down.
author: Klemen V.
pros: I like SERP analysis and content optimisation. Optimisation is based upon many results (not just top 20) and yield superior results.
cons: Expensive credits. To be honest, I am using other tools for outline building as I find MarketMuse credits too expensive.

review_title: MarketMuse is highly useful for SEO research and content generation. It is essential to my work.
description: MarketMuse is an essential part of my daily SEO/content marketing workflow.
author: Mark L.
pros: I love the topic-based keyword research and the content optimization features, which are as good or better than much more expensive, similar products.
cons: I don't like how the content saving feature works. It may be my fault for not learning how to use it properly.

review_title: Advanced SEO Insights and Ideas
description: Marketmuse is a good tool to implement into your content marketing / SEO workflow. It gives you new ideas when other tools are stopping. For my case, it best to be implemented inside a workflow with copywriting and other SEO Tools which complement each other. Marketmuse gives me the extra edge over my competitors and sheds light into different kinds of topic that may be covered by your competition. It has this enterprise feeling / power.
author: Coën V.
pros: - keyword research though a bit limited on data (search query, etc) - nice guidance on workflow while using this tool - clean clustering of sources and their topic authority - good results for EN search queries
cons: - cannot delete old projects (as of now) - some features do need extra credits - sometimes you don't get what you pay for...your expectations are higher than the AI's output - as always, languages other than EN may have less data

review_title: Essential for a copy team
description: Overall, MarketMuse has improved the quality of our copy. It's more SEO-friendly, and, as a result, is performing better in the SERPs. What's more, MarketMuse has helped us cover the breadth and width of a subject with all of its recommendations. When writers use MarketMuse, you can feel more confident that those pieces will rank.
author: Daniella A.
pros: Listen, you're not going to rank in the SERPs if you're not on your SEO game. MarketMuse doesn't replace a fully-fledged SEO professional, but it's certainly a start. You can type in the title of your piece, (like "Best Cell Phone Plans") and you'll get a full list of SEO keywords you'll want to hit. Have those results dictate your piece, and then make sure to run a test when you're done and see your SEO score. We've seen pieces consistently perform better when adding MarketMuse to our process.
cons: As is the case with most SEO software, you'll get super random keyword recommendations sometimes. For example, you'll be writing about 4K TVs and MarketMuse will recommend you talk about dog houses for some reason. Just ignore the random recommendations and focus on those that make sense.

review_title: Hands down the best tool if not only for Content Marketers
author: Shekhor B.
pros: I don't know about others but I only use two features from this software. Research Optimize I use the Research feature to research the terms (entity) needed to write about for Article. And Optimize feature to optimize the artcile according to the competitors which generally changes time to time for algorithm changes.
cons: Their pricing plan. Don't get me wrong. It was one of the costly service offered for these sort of fuctionalities until it offered their lifetime deal on AppSumo. I bought 3 codes from their to unlock the most of the feature of it. Around a month ago they offered all their features for free users. Like unlocked everything except credits for the free user. This is what hard digest when you spent around $200 for it where the free users are getting it for zero money spending.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: MarketMuse is for serious Content Strategists
description: The MarketMuse team has been great to work with on projects. They really go above and beyond to make sure you are getting satisfaction out of the tool. If there are any questions or issues that come up they will attempt to quickly resolve them.
author: Brian C.
pros: Time saver Knowledge development Process oriented UX
cons: At times it can take a bit for analysis to come back but this tool does some heavy computation on each query so I can understand that.

review_title: MarketMuse is a must have for content marketers!
description: Very pleasant and easy to use. The userface is very intuitive and we see SEO improvements in all the pieces we publish on our site using MarketMuse.
author: Felicia S.
pros: The target score, average score, and content score are very helpful.
cons: Sometimes the keyword suggestions were unrelated to the content topic.

review_title: Market Muse is perfect for growing your brand with pillar content, optimized for SEO
description: The business problem I'm solving with Market Muse, is bridging the gap between my outdated 2010-2013 SEO knowledge, to understanding what is working now to purposely rank articles for search terms. The old "grey hat" methods no longer work, or work for such a little time I feel it's pointless to focus on little tricks. If you want to master white hat SEO, Market Muse is the tool you need in your arsenal.
author: Joshua V.
pros: Market Muse is not exactly an inexpensive piece of software. While they do have a limited free version, if you want to use the software seriously it will cost you a minimum of $150/month. However, that cost is worth it if you have a brand that's worth growing, with something unique, that you are passionate about, and have a message to spread. Because what Market Muse will allow you to do, is create deep pillar content that is built to rank for Google's search engine, and is very enjoyable for humans to read. That in itself will allow your brand to attract targeted search engine traffic, that is more than worth the investment cost. This is pure "white hat", long term SEO. If you're looking for a quick trick to beat the search engines, this is not the tool for you. If you're looking to build a long term asset, worth quite a bit of revenue, this is the tool for you.
cons: What I like least about this software is getting started does take quite a bit of learning, and diving through tutorials. They include a free course to learn the software, and trust me you will need it. Because of the power of this software, I don't think they could really make it anymore simple than it already is. Some pieces of software simply require you to take a few days to learn it. But it's well worth taking the time.
author_profession: Email Copywriter & Soap Opera Sequence Expert

review_title: Some of the features are great, others haven't been as useful for me
description: I got a good deal on MM so I'm satisfied with it for the price. I think if I were paying full price, I might be disappointed.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I enjoy the "optimize" app within Market Muse the most. It helps me write content that can compete with other sites in the top 10 on Google SERP for my target phrase. It gives enough info to help me improve my writing but not so much that I become confused by what to concentrate on first.
cons: I tried the AI for content writing function and had a very ridiculous end product. It consisted of gibberish that was not even close to usable. It's possible I didn't set up the brief correctly, but I did spend about half a day learning about how to do it and still had a crummy end product.

review_title: So easy a non-SEO can use it
description: MarketMuse is an extremely easy software to use for people who are relatively new to SEO keyword research. You won't get super in-depth results, but you'll get a good idea of keywords to start out with in your pursuit for Google ranking.
author: Tyler A.
pros: If you're looking for keywords, it's the simplest software I've used. All you do is a stick the subject of your piece in the MarketMuse search bar and you'll get all the data you need. You'll get search volumes for different keywords, competition levels, and how many keywords you should use. It doesn't replace a fully-fledged SEO, but it's enough to get started with optimizing written content.
cons: Don't believe everything MarketMuse tells you about keywords. Sometimes you'll get keyword recommendations that don't make any sense for what you're writing about. For example, I was writing a piece about streaming the channel FOX, and I got keyword recommendations about actual foxes.

review_title: Great Tool for Optimizing / Producing Quality Content
description: They've been great to work with, answered all my questions. We just signed up two ago after a short trial and are starting onboarding next week!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a business owner who manages two full time editors it is important for me to give my team some sort of guideline as how to write for the internet. This tool gives us a great way to train our team and track their progress. They can find topics to write about and expand on existing pages throughout our site. It gives us a quality score, and how we are comparing against our competitors - which is nice as I need to know that we are having and impact with our work.
cons: Well it's very expensive and for a small business it is a hard decision to make. However, paying PPC every month is also really expensive, content is a long term investment and PPC is really short term.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Discovering and adding keywords to my blog post is super easy with MarketMuse!
author: Abdul B.
pros: Once I'm done with creating briefs for my blog post, I use MarketMuse to find all the keywords and the number of instances I must add to rank above my competitors. And it works! MarketMuse has helped improve our blog rankings on SERP.
cons: So far, nothing. I love MarketMuse and have been using it for the past year.

review_title: Optimize your content and score high
description: It's a great tool for content optimization
author: emalyn M.
pros: I like the way it suggests what must be done to my content especially how the keywords must be disseminated properly.
cons: The authentication when logging in is sometimes annoying but of course it's for security purposes

review_title: Great tool to help rank better from an SEO perspective
description: We are now ranking much better in search results because of leveraging MarketMuse.
author: Joe K.
pros: Love the ease of use in helping guide our content decisions to ensure we rank well. It is easy to see what keywords would improve our rankings as compared to competitors.
cons: I wish there were a keyword research tool to guide our paid search efforts. We love MarketMuse and want to find other ways to leverage its strengths.

review_title: Radically changed how we research, plan, and create content. And it's amazing.
description: Our content better meets the needs of our readers, it expedites and improves our content strategies, and our rankings in Google have improved.
author: Jason G.
pros: The depth of this software is hard to overstate. Our articles have gotten longer, better researched, and tend to cover the topic much more deeply and with more expertise. In every way, our content is a better match for our audience, for our internal goals, and even for Google, because we're writing the content that truly captures the interest and desires of our audience and Google just loves that.
cons: It's possible that your old way of researching and writing content will need to be rethought. It's uncommon for software to truly force you to change how you do things, but the value you get from doing it right is just so powerful, you'd be silly not to invest the short amount of time needed to really take advantage of the platform.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am not very impressed with this product.
author: Nima S.
pros: I found it comfortable and intuitive to use. I was not very impressed with the functionality.
cons: In order to benefit from the best features of the product, it is necessary to pay a large amount of money.

review_title: Fantastic Tool For Content Marketing
description: If you're on the fence, or are just starting out looking for ways to improve your content, do yourself a favor and reach out to the MarketMuse team.
author: Jay B.
pros: It provides valuable insight to improve your content creation and optimization. I'm been excited to see the performance of all of our content efforts improve.
cons: At first it was the price, so I tried a bunch of cheaper options and tried to tape different platforms together but since pulling the trigger on paying for access to MarketMuse I've been kicking myself for waiting so long.

review_title: Excellent Content Optimization Tool for Pro Marketers
author: Shaikat R.
pros: MarketMuse is an excellent tool for optimizing articles. If you want your website to perform better on SERP, this tool can help you with that process. It identifies and tells you all the important entities you can add to your content so that search engines can better understand and value them. If you're a beginner yet want to get the hang of an advanced content optimizer, you can use the free version of MarketMuse. The pro plans have many advanced features you can try if you can afford them.
cons: Very expensive and certainly not suitable for beginners or small content marketers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Takes the Guesswork out of Creating Content that Will Serve You Well
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to use. It gives you insight on how to imrpove your content so you can really be the best in your niche.
cons: The price is a bit of a sticker shock, but worth it once you realize there are no other tools out there that can do quite the job it can.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Not the cheapest, but, probably the best
author: Leonardo W.
pros: MarketMuse is not the cheapest tool around, but, if you need a professional tool, that will help you to research, plan and create content that converts, this is definitely the best tool. The price can be justified by the quality of the data. In order to create content, you need good and FRESH data, and MarketMuse is the best tool when comes to this angle. If you want to succeed with content, you need this!
cons: I think the only con is the price, that is a little bit high, but, the price is according to the quality of the tool and ROI you obtain.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool for Content Driven SEO Boost
description: It's helping us write better, more informed content that gives our users the best answer or feedback possible. It's wonderful. There's so much we haven't even been able to drill inot yet and it's already been so helpful in that.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tool helped find where our content has gaps and then determine the type of content and articles we could write to fill those gaps. Looked at keywords and semantically related terms and phrases to ensure the content was thorough and well written for our audience.
cons: The only I wish would change is the price but I absolutely understand why it can't It's a spend that smaller agencies may not be able to justify.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
